name: Hydration Summarizer
description: Every 90 minutes, review the drinking event log collected by the background watcher and send a hydration status reminder if needed.
goal: Review the drinking activity log for the past 90 minutes. Call vision.count_objects with event_log_path='{{CLAWTAIL_DATA_DIR}}/drink_events.jsonl', label='cup', window_minutes=90. Also call with label='bottle'. Sum the counts. Compare against a healthy hydration baseline (at least 1 drink per 90 minutes). If insufficient, send a Feishu hydration reminder. Save a daily summary.
constraints: Call vision.count_objects with event_log_path='{{CLAWTAIL_DATA_DIR}}/drink_events.jsonl' — use this exact path, do not guess or modify it
Only call notify.feishu_send if total drinking event count (cup + bottle) is below 1 in the past 90 minutes
Always save a summary via storage.save_summary with category 'hydration'
Do not include raw event log data in the notification — aggregate count and recommendation only
